rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §12.257, which governs charter application content for adult education programs. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An eligible entity must include in its charter application the information required by Subsection (b).
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns adult education charter applications, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
